hypothesis: A multi-fidelity Bayesian optimization strategy that augments polymer-specific pre-trained embeddings with explicit architectural descriptors (branching index and crosslink density) and allocates five high-fidelity long-timescale MD simulations within a 30-simulation budget will identify at least one polymer whose long-timescale-MD-validated CO2 uptake lies in the top 5% of a 1000-sample pool with at least twice the probability of a single-fidelity BO using only linear-polymer embeddings and fast MD+GCMC labels.
